title: Terter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Terter''' was a [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracer]] in the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]]. During the second lap, they closed in on [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]]. Sebulba broke a small piece of his [[Sebulba's Podracer/Legends|podracer]] and it flew into the engine of Terter's engine. Terter swung towards [[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's podracer]], damaging a strap connecting the pod to the engines. Skywalker reconnected the strap and resumed the race.<ref name="Souvenir Annual 2000">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Phantom Menace: The Official Souvenir Annual 2000]]''</ref> Although they were out, Terter survived the race.

==Appearances==
